text: I feel a sense of curiosity and slight overwhelm standing in these spaces. The atmosphere is energetic, perhaps because of the group in the first room, focused around a shared task or presentation, as indicated by the countdown timer. The second space feels more contemplative, immersed in innovation and research, with walls adorned in colors and ideas. I am struck by how environments can shift the rhythm of thought — from hurried time-bound excitement to slow, reflective observation. I feel caught between anticipation and wonder, not quite knowing what comes next.
